name: Jiandaoyun No-Code MCP
description: Jiandaoyun private no-code platform tools exposed through MCP, with OpenClaw-oriented install helpers, schema cache, one-step northwest-company business tools, presets, discovery, field mapping, records, and workflow todos.

JIANDAOYUN_API_KEY.description: Jiandaoyun API key. Do not store real secrets in the package.

JIANDAOYUN_USER_MAP_FILE.description: Optional JSON file mapping upstream requester IDs or names to Jiandaoyun usernames.

JIANDAOYUN_USER_MAP_JSON.description: Optional JSON object mapping upstream requester IDs or names to Jiandaoyun usernames.

JIANDAOYUN_REQUIRED_FIELDS_FILE.description: Optional JSON file mapping app/form keys to business-required field label arrays.

JIANDAOYUN_REQUIRED_FIELDS_JSON.description: Optional JSON object mapping app/form keys to business-required field label arrays.

JIANDAOYUN_DEFAULT_DATA_CREATOR.description: Optional fallback Jiandaoyun username for data_creator when no requester identity is supplied. Use only for single-user deployments.
